"[125] ^CT602-4 LL -- PATRIOT ENVIRONMENTAL IS 1097; THEY WERE CONTRACTED BY THE RESP PTY // APPROX 25 GAL DIESEL MIXED W/ FIRE FIGHTING WATER OR FOAM THAT MADE IT INTO THE DRAIN / APPROX 4 HRS FOR CLEAN UP [Shared]"
"[124] ^CT601-2 SIGN TK -- 1097 NB 5 AT GEN ON RHS / HIS SIGN READS "ACCIDENT AHEAD PREPARE TO SLOW DOWN" [Shared]"

"[90] 87-10A2 AT NB 5 AT GENESEE ONR JUST IN CASE WE NEED TO CLOSE IT [Shared]"
"[87] 87-S2 - PER FIRE CHIEF DIESEL FUEL WENT DOWN DRAINAGE -FIRE STARTED HAZMT START CT FOR HARD CLOSURE and HAVE UNITS START W/ CONE PATTERN BLKG 3/4/5- [Shared]"
"[86] S2 INFO TRAFFIC ALL BLOCKED FOR NB SIDE TRAFFIC WAITING FOR FIRE ENG OR TK WILL BE COMING WW WHILE TRAFFIC STOPPED TO SUPPLY WATER [Shared]"
"[83] A87-015 ADVS S UNIT TRAFFIC IS STILL FLOWING IN BYPASS LNS [Shared]"
"[77] 87- 7 FIRE IS JUST IN CABIN NOT SPREAD TO TANKER ALL TRAFFIC STOPPED WAITING FOR CD4 [Shared]"
"[76] 87-S2 UNIT CAN ADVS HOW FAR PERIMETER ZONE NEEDS TO BE KEPT CLR FOR FIRE OR ADVS ANY BULDING IN AREA [Shared]"

Log.Location: "Sr60 E Wo / World Logistics Center Wlc"

details.IncidentDetail: "[8] SV CONTD HIGH SPEEDS IN CD AFTER TCS OCCD "
"[7] SV ALSO HIT A BLK TELSA AND UNK OTHER VEH THAT TCD INTO THE CD -- BOTH THESE VIC'S CONT'D "
"[6] RP NOW ON RS OF OF WLC OFR -- WIDE RS -- RP FEELS SAFE TO 1023 THERE "
"[5] TRIED TO RUN RP OFF THE ROAD -- SCRATCHES AND PAINT TRANSFER DRIVERS SIDE REAR AND BACK BUMPER TC DMG "
"[6] 152 ADV VEH IN CD NEG BLOCKING"
"[3] RP CAME HOME AND NOTICED THE DMG - WHI PAINT LEFT ON RPS VEH "
"[1] RPS VEH SIL NISS ALT PARKED IFO ABOVE 1020 "
